expectations.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale
expectations.evidence: 'Rating: 4/5 — Good fit, minor gaps to validate' — clean, no scale table

expectations.text: Strengths section with specific evidence from the resume
expectations.evidence: 7 strengths, each one line with evidence. Much tighter than iteration 1

expectations.text: Gaps section distinguishing unknowns from red flags
expectations.evidence: 4 gaps, each one line, all tagged 'Unknown'

expectations.text: Risks section addresses title/level concern and startup-to-midsize transition
expectations.evidence: 4 risks, each 1-2 lines: title sensitivity, pace mismatch, flight risk, Staff calibration
Full decision framework with all 4 conditions
7 questions in compact bullet format (Targets/Good answer/Probe/Red flag)

expectations.text: Includes a scoring rubric for the call
Questions target identified gaps, not generic
expectations.evidence: Q1: Staff scope, Q2: mentorship, Q3: architecture tradeoffs, Q4: data modeling gap, Q5: pace, Q6: title, Q7: cross-functional
